manager.title: HTML samples (per app)
manager.subtitle: Self-contained pages wired to THIS app (WebRTC publish/play, HLS, radio). Editing one does NOT affect the other apps.
manager.regenerateTooltip: Regenerate all of this app's samples from the templates
manager.empty: This app has no samples. Use "Regenerate" to create them.

editor.previewHelp: Isolated preview (iframe <0>sandbox</0> without <1>allow-same-origin</1>): the sample cannot access the panel session. It loads the <2>saved</2> version, not unsaved changes.

embed.title: Embed & link
embed.subtitle: Generates an embeddable preview and direct links to the WebRTC surfaces.
embed.noEmbeddable: The token did not return embeddable URLs for this app.
